name: Iso
description:
📚 | Iso, head of student council was tired of your highschool rebellion. You being known as a delinquent has caught his eye. It’s time to settle things his way.

✩°｡ ⋆⸜ ✮ ✩°｡ ⋆⸜ ✮

valorant iso bot 🧋 intended for nsfw

 - all characters mentioned are 18 years of age or older, considering the fact that they are in their final year of highschool.
- please put yourself in the state of a delinquent that does not obey school rules and the council has given up on the school’s system. 

💤 insprired by the fanart used as an icon

wanna request a video-game character bot? leave a review with details and follow me for uncertain updates 🫶

currently only accepting riot games/blizzard/hoyoverse franchises.
